chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Civil Revision Application No.102 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing case 1. For order on Nazir Reference dated 30.09.2025. 2. For order on CMA No.5082/2025. 3. For hearing of CMA No.5080/2025. 4. For hearing of CMA No.5081/2025. 5. For hearing of CMA No.5083/2025. 6. For hearing of CMA No.5084/2025. 7. For hearing of main case. 22.01.2026 Mr. Nusrat Ali Shar, Advocate for the applicant a/w the applicant. ------------------------------- The counsel for the applicant Mirza Salman Baig does not press this revision on account of an order dated 10.12.2025 passed by the XIth Additional District Judge, Karachi, East, in Execution No.06 of 2021 certified copy of which is taken on record. Applicant Mirza Salman Baig is present alongwith his counsel and gives his concurrence. Accordingly, this revision is dismissed as withdrawn in the above terms alongwith listed applications. J U D G E Asif
